title: Bulk select automations to duplicate, delete, or make inactive

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
I sometimes duplicate boards for their structure, but still want to adjust the new board and create different kinds of automations for it.

I recently duplicated a board that had 121 automations that are active. Since the duplication includes the automations, I now have to individually delete the automations or individually mark them inactive if I think I might use them later. I would love the option to bulk select automations.
